palette.name: paper cream
palette.usage: large readable panel centers and torn-paper surfaces

palette.name: hot magazine pink
palette.usage: primary buttons, stickers, energetic title accents

palette.name: cyan cover blue
palette.usage: brush strokes, progress bars, active highlights

palette.name: black tape
palette.usage: tape strips, dividers, strong outer accents

layout_language: decorative marks near corners, not across content

component_rules.panel: Use torn-paper silhouettes with blue or pink outline accents and a calm cream content center.
component_rules.button: Use sticker-like rounded paper strips with hot pink fill, cyan stroke, and a clean central text lane.
component_rules.bar: Use magazine cutout meter strips with black ink frame and cyan/pink fill separation.
component_rules.icon: Use polaroid or sticker frames with tape corners and empty central image space.
component_rules.decor: Use tape, brush strokes, halftone clusters, doodle marks, and paper scraps as separate overlay elements.

avoid: do not copy the Megami logo
do not generate characters, faces, bodies, or portraits inside UI assets
do not bake readable text into generated art
do not cover the central text-safe area with grunge
avoid realistic metal, medieval frames, or generic sci-fi neon panels
